title: Basic Global Thresholding Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative algorithm for determining a global threshold value in an image.
elements: Apply Threshold to Create Binary Image
relationships: Process starts with an input image and initial threshold estimate
Image pixels are separated into two groups based on the current threshold
A new threshold is calculated from the mean intensities of the two groups
The process iterates until the threshold value converges (changes less than ΔT)
The final threshold is applied to create a binary output image
